steelmanned_positions.description: Rescue the strongest defensible version of each live position in the debate — including the one you find least convincing. Make each as strong as its best advocate would.

strongest_form.description: Its most defensible articulation, granting it every fair benefit of the doubt.

rests_on.description: The key assumption this strongest form depends on — a candidate crux.

cruxes_surfaced.description: The load-bearing assumptions separating the positions — the ones that, if resolved, would settle which position wins.

verified.description: true only if a grounded (re-openable) ledger entry establishes it.
